meta.name: Athletic Flow
meta.description: A premium activewear and lifestyle brand focusing on movement, comfort, and performance. The aesthetic is clean, modern, and editorial with large imagery and minimal typography, targeting an active, affluent demographic.

fonts.sans: system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif
fonts.display: system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif
fonts.mono: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, 'Liberation Mono', 'Courier New', monospace
fonts.serif: ui-serif, Georgia, Cambria, 'Times New Roman', Times, serif

header.notes: The header appears near the bottom of the screenshot before the final CTA banner, featuring a logo on the left, standard navigation links, a search bar, location setting, and icon buttons on the right.

footer.notes: A true footer is not clearly visible; the closest element is the header/nav bar appearing lower on the page before a final large background image CTA.

productCard.notes: Clean product cards with a light grey background for the image. Below the image, the product name, price, and color swatches are displayed. No visible borders or complex hover effects are apparent.

productGrid.notes: Horizontal scrolling carousels are used for product grids, with previous/next arrow buttons positioned below the cards.

featuredProducts.heading: Your practice, expanded.
featuredProducts.notes: A horizontal scrolling carousel of product cards with a section heading on the left and a 'Shop now' button on the right.

design.styling: Thin strip at the very top, minimal padding.

content.headline: Promotional banner with delivery offer
content.specialElements: Left and right arrow icons for scrolling multiple messages.

sections.name: hero
sections.layout: Full-bleed background image with text overlay, bottom-aligned text.

design.background: Full-bleed lifestyle photograph showing a group yoga session outdoors.
design.text: White, large, bold sans-serif headline, smaller regular weight subtitle.
design.styling: Text overlay is positioned on the left, slightly above the bottom edge. Pill-shaped buttons.

content.headline: Bold statement about feeling and space
content.body: A short descriptive sentence about the sensation of the practice.
content.cta: Two solid light grey pill-shaped buttons with dark text, and circular play/arrow buttons.

media.description: Group outdoor yoga session on mats.

sections.name: product-carousel
sections.layout: Header with title left, button right. Below, a horizontal scrollable row of product cards.

design.styling: Standard grid-like spacing, but implemented as a carousel with navigation arrows at the bottom right.

content.headline: Section title introducing new practice wear.
content.cta: Single black pill-shaped 'Shop now' button at the top right.

media.description: Studio shots of models wearing activewear on light grey backgrounds.

content.specialElements: Circular arrow buttons for carousel navigation.

sections.name: split-features
sections.layout: Two column grid (50/50 split), image on top, text below for each column.

design.text: Large black headings, regular body text.
design.styling: Large square lifestyle images, minimal padding between image and text below.

content.headline: Short descriptive titles for each feature block.
content.body: Brief paragraph describing the fabric/fit benefits.
content.cta: Solid black pill-shaped button under each description.

media.description: Lifestyle shots of models in yoga poses.

content.specialElements: Small download/share icon overlaid on the bottom right of each image.

sections.name: secondary-hero
sections.layout: Full-bleed background image with large faint text behind, and clear text in front, centered.

design.background: Full-bleed lifestyle image in a gym setting.
design.text: Very large, faint, light-colored background text; smaller, clear white subtitle in front.

content.headline: Massive faint background text, with a clear subtitle regarding heavy lifting.
content.cta: Two solid light grey pill-shaped buttons with dark text.

media.description: Man lifting weights in a gym.

sections.name: category-grid
sections.layout: Title top left, followed by a 4-column grid of tall, portrait-oriented category cards.

design.text: Large black heading, centered category labels below images.
design.styling: Images touch each other (zero gap) forming a continuous visual block.

media.description: Models showcasing different clothing lines in varied settings.

sections.name: social-gallery
sections.layout: Centered header and subtext, followed by a masonry/collage style grid of user-generated content.

design.text: Centered black heading and small body text.
design.styling: Complex grid layout combining vertical, horizontal, and square images/videos with no gaps.

content.headline: Call to action to wear and share.
content.body: Instructions on how to get featured using tags.

media.description: Collage of user-generated lifestyle photos and videos in various active settings.

content.specialElements: Shopping bag icon overlay on images indicating shoppable content, video player controls on video items.

sections.name: activity-categories
sections.layout: Title left, filter tabs right. Below, a 6-column grid of square category images.

design.text: Large black heading, centered text below images.
design.styling: Images touch each other (zero gap) forming a continuous visual block.

content.headline: Shop by Activity.

media.description: Models engaged in specific activities (yoga, running, tennis, etc.).

content.specialElements: Tabbed navigation (Women/Men) to the right of the headline.

sections.name: seasonal-carousel
sections.layout: Large headline left, stacked buttons right. Below, a horizontal scrollable row of product cards.

design.text: Very large black heading spanning multiple lines.

content.headline: Seasonal statement about styles belonging in the sunshine.
content.cta: Two pill-shaped buttons stacked vertically (one outlined, one solid black).

media.description: Studio shots of models in seasonal wear.

content.specialElements: Circular arrow buttons for carousel navigation.

sections.name: color-categories
sections.layout: Title left, filter tabs right. Below, a 6-column grid of tall portrait category images.

design.text: Large black heading, centered text below images.
design.styling: Images touch each other (zero gap) forming a continuous visual block.

content.headline: Shop by colour.

media.description: Models wearing monochrome outfits in various colors on background colors matching the outfits.

content.specialElements: Tabbed navigation (Women/Men) to the right of the headline.

sections.name: fit-categories
sections.layout: Title left, filter tabs right. Below, a 4-column grid of tall portrait category images.

design.text: Large black heading, centered text below images.
design.styling: Images touch each other (zero gap) forming a continuous visual block.

content.headline: Meet the greatest fits.

media.description: Models showcasing different fits/styles on light grey backgrounds.

content.specialElements: Tabbed navigation (Women/Men) to the right of the headline.

sections.name: final-cta-banner
sections.layout: Full-width background image with centered text overlay.

design.text: Large white headline, smaller regular subtitle.
design.styling: Centered content over a large image.

content.headline: Large promotional statement regarding delivery and returns.
content.specialElements: A small vertical 'Feedback' tab is visible on the right edge of the screen.
